testcase.name: Award points creates transaction and updates balance
testcase.file: Loyalty Points Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\LoyaltyPointsService)::Award points creates transaction and updates balance

testcase.name: Award points applies multiplier from active membership
testcase.file: Loyalty Points Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\LoyaltyPointsService)::Award points applies multiplier from active membership

testcase.name: Spend points deducts balance
testcase.file: Loyalty Points Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\LoyaltyPointsService)::Spend points deducts balance

testcase.name: Spend points throws when insufficient balance
testcase.file: Loyalty Points Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\LoyaltyPointsService)::Spend points throws when insufficient balance

testcase.name: Convert to credits spends points and returns result
testcase.file: Loyalty Points Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\LoyaltyPointsService)::Convert to credits spends points and returns result

testcase.name: Get balance returns correct data
testcase.file: Loyalty Points Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\LoyaltyPointsService)::Get balance returns correct data

testcase.name: Get balance creates record if missing
testcase.file: Loyalty Points Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\LoyaltyPointsService)::Get balance creates record if missing

testcase.name: Subscribe creates active membership
testcase.file: Membership Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\MembershipService)::Subscribe creates active membership

testcase.name: Subscribe throws when card not active
testcase.file: Membership Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\MembershipService)::Subscribe throws when card not active

testcase.name: Subscribe throws for invalid tier
testcase.file: Membership Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\MembershipService)::Subscribe throws for invalid tier

testcase.name: Subscribe throws for duplicate active membership
testcase.file: Membership Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\MembershipService)::Subscribe throws for duplicate active membership

testcase.name: Cancel sets status to cancelled
testcase.file: Membership Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\MembershipService)::Cancel sets status to cancelled

testcase.name: Renew extends expiry
testcase.file: Membership Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\MembershipService)::Renew extends expiry

testcase.name: Change tier updates tier
testcase.file: Membership Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\MembershipService)::Change tier updates tier

testcase.name: Change tier throws for invalid tier
testcase.file: Membership Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\MembershipService)::Change tier throws for invalid tier

testcase.name: Subscribe increments total members
testcase.file: Membership Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\MembershipService)::Subscribe increments total members

testcase.name: Get available rewards returns tier eligible
testcase.file: Reward Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\RewardService)::Get available rewards returns tier eligible

testcase.name: Redeem reward creates redemption
testcase.file: Reward Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\RewardService)::Redeem reward creates redemption

testcase.name: Redeem reward spends points
testcase.file: Reward Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\RewardService)::Redeem reward spends points

testcase.name: Redeem reward throws when tier insufficient
testcase.file: Reward Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\RewardService)::Redeem reward throws when tier insufficient

testcase.name: Redeem reward throws when inactive
testcase.file: Reward Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\RewardService)::Redeem reward throws when inactive

testcase.name: Cancel redemption decrements counter
testcase.file: Reward Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\RewardService)::Cancel redemption decrements counter

testcase.name: Fulfil redemption sets fulfilled status
testcase.file: Reward Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\RewardService)::Fulfil redemption sets fulfilled status

testcase.name: Can access event without tier requirement
testcase.file: Tier Access Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\TierAccessService)::Can access event without tier requirement

testcase.name: Cannot access tier gated event without membership
testcase.file: Tier Access Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\TierAccessService)::Cannot access tier gated event without membership

testcase.name: Can access tier gated event with qualifying membership
testcase.file: Tier Access Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\TierAccessService)::Can access tier gated event with qualifying membership

testcase.name: Cannot access with lower tier
testcase.file: Tier Access Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\TierAccessService)::Cannot access with lower tier

testcase.name: Get user tier for card
testcase.file: Tier Access Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\TierAccessService)::Get user tier for card

testcase.name: Get user tier returns null without membership
testcase.file: Tier Access Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\TierAccessService)::Get user tier returns null without membership

testcase.name: Expired membership does not grant access
testcase.file: Tier Access Service (Tests\Unit\Services\Loyalty\TierAccessService)::Expired membership does not grant access

testcase.name: Is active when status active and not expired
testcase.file: Loyalty Card Member Model (Tests\Unit\Models\Loyalty\LoyaltyCardMemberModel)::Is active when status active and not expired

testcase.name: Is not active when expired
testcase.file: Loyalty Card Member Model (Tests\Unit\Models\Loyalty\LoyaltyCardMemberModel)::Is not active when expired

testcase.name: Is not active when cancelled
testcase.file: Loyalty Card Member Model (Tests\Unit\Models\Loyalty\LoyaltyCardMemberModel)::Is not active when cancelled

testcase.name: Tier level returns correct numeric value
testcase.file: Loyalty Card Member Model (Tests\Unit\Models\Loyalty\LoyaltyCardMemberModel)::Tier level returns correct numeric value

testcase.name: Meets or exceeds tier returns true for equal
testcase.file: Loyalty Card Member Model (Tests\Unit\Models\Loyalty\LoyaltyCardMemberModel)::Meets or exceeds tier returns true for equal

testcase.name: Meets or exceeds tier returns true for higher
testcase.file: Loyalty Card Member Model (Tests\Unit\Models\Loyalty\LoyaltyCardMemberModel)::Meets or exceeds tier returns true for higher

testcase.name: Meets or exceeds tier returns false for lower
testcase.file: Loyalty Card Member Model (Tests\Unit\Models\Loyalty\LoyaltyCardMemberModel)::Meets or exceeds tier returns false for lower

testcase.name: Expiring scope finds soon expiring
testcase.file: Loyalty Card Member Model (Tests\Unit\Models\Loyalty\LoyaltyCardMemberModel)::Expiring scope finds soon expiring

testcase.name: Points multiplier returns default when no tier config
testcase.file: Loyalty Card Member Model (Tests\Unit\Models\Loyalty\LoyaltyCardMemberModel)::Points multiplier returns default when no tier config
